'''Brawn Dunkee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] criminal who lived during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted [[Death/Legends|dead]] by the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] for kidnapping one of their dignitaries. He was killed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]].

*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
